description_long: This is a compact, rectangular promotional kiosk with a sturdy metal frame and a flat counter surface. The front and side panels are decorated with vibrant, splashy graphics featuring a company logo and tagline, while the rear and some side panels are plain white. The kiosk includes a tall, vertical signboard above the counter for branding, supported by two slim metal posts. The lower section appears to be a storage cabinet with double doors, likely for keeping promotional materials or supplies. The overall design is clean and functional, suitable for use in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or event spaces.
description: A compact, metal-framed promotional kiosk with colorful branding panels, a flat counter, and an overhead signboard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the colorful logo panel, counter surface, and overhead signboard.
description_view_1: Rear angled view revealing plain white back panels and the side of the counter.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the plain double-door storage cabinet and minimal branding.
description_view_3: Side-rear view highlighting the plain side and the depth of the counter area.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and logo; one large printed signboard above the counter and printed logo graphics on the front and side panels. Visible text: 'COMPANY LOGO', 'TAGLINE HERE'.
attribute_door_configuration: Double cabinet doors at the rear, hinged, located at the base.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof formed by the top signboard, no overhangs or decorative elements, likely made of laminate or plastic.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist with functional, clean lines and bold graphic branding.
